known_gaps: KiCad ERC reports only warning-level one-pin label findings for exported standalone LED ports.
KiCad DRC reports warning-level footprint-library mismatch and silkscreen clearance findings for generated footprint copies.
Writer correctness still warns when no resolver library index or external round-trip evidence is configured.
notes: Smallest optional design-create fixture promoted to candidate with schematic electrical checks, LED local-route contact proof, writer correctness, board validation, and warning-only KiCad ERC/DRC evidence.
